UserNames_s = tostring(UserNames), UserSamAccountNames_s = tostring(UserSamAccountNames), ContainsMaliciousExternalIPs_b = ContainsMaliciousExternalIPs, AggregatedExternalIPThreatTypes_s = tostring(AggregatedExternalIPThreatTypes), Assets_s = tostring(Assets), FlaggedDataExposed_s = tostring(FlaggedDataExposed), SensitiveDataExposed_s = tostring(SensitiveDataExposed), DataSourceTypes_s = tostring(DataSourceTypes), DataSources_s = tostring(DataSources), DeviceNames_s = tostring(DeviceNames), InitialEventTimeUTC_t = InitialEventTimeUTC, AccountsHaveFollowUpIndicators_s = tostring(AccountsHaveFollowUpIndicators), AlertTimeUTC_t = AlertTimeUTC, InitialEventTime_t = InitialEventTime, AssignedtoVaronis_b = AssignedtoVaronis, EscalationType_s = EscalationType, MitreTacticName_s = MitreTacticName, ClosedBy_s = ClosedBy, IngestTime_t = IngestTime | project TimeGenerated, AlertId_g, ThreatDetectionPolicyName_s, AlertTime_t, AlertSeverity_s, AlertCategory_s, Countries_s, States_s, Status_s, CloseReason_s, BlacklistedLocation_b, AbnormalLocations_s, EventsCount_d, PrivilegedAccountType_s, UserNames_s, UserSamAccountNames_s, ContainsMaliciousExternalIPs_b,
